title: Add wgpu volume raymarch viewport
notes: Wired viewer-egui to initialize VolumeWgpuRenderer from eframe CreationContext, switched Volume 3D controls to raymarch settings, enabled eframe wgpu feature, and fixed wgpu 27 scissor typing. cargo fmt and cargo test pass.
close_reason: WGPU volume raymarcher is integrated into viewer-egui, the app now initializes the renderer from eframe, raymarch controls replaced old billboard controls, and workspace tests pass.

title: Add canonical species seeds and start multi-kernel architecture
notes: Fixed a scale-induced performance regression in species loading. Species scale no longer multiplies the whole world edge by the same factor; the viewer now computes a recommended box size from the scaled seed extent plus scaled radius padding, so higher-resolution species loads do not automatically jump from 64^3 to 128^3/192^3 unless the organism actually needs that space.

title: Auto-reseed extinct worlds
notes: Added extinction detection to ViewerApp::step_once. If the post-step world max density is <= 1e-6, the app immediately randomizes a fresh world and resets frame state. Added regression test covering extinct-world auto reseed; cargo test passes.
close_reason: ViewerApp now auto-reseeds extinct worlds after a step, with a regression test covering the behavior; cargo test passes.

title: Improve 3D viewport with alpha-blended voxel billboards
description: Replace point-style 3D rendering with alpha-blended voxel billboards so low-life cells are transparent, high-life cells are opaque, and the visible structure fills volume space more convincingly.
acceptance_criteria: 3D viewport uses alpha based on life value; rendered glyphs are voxel-like quads rather than circles; controls reflect visibility floor and voxel sizing; docs updated; tests pass.
notes:
Switching the 3D viewport from circles to alpha-blended voxel billboards. Opacity will follow life value, with a low visibility floor for culling and performance.
Switched the 3D viewport to alpha-blended voxel billboards. Opacity now follows life value directly, visibility uses a low culling floor, and projected voxels are downsampled after a full scan so large random volumes do not bias toward one side of the box.
close_reason: Improved the 3D viewport with alpha-blended voxel billboards and unbiased downsampling.

title: Add GitHub Actions build and release workflow
notes: Added .github/workflows/build-release.yml. Workflow runs on every push and workflow_dispatch, builds viewer-egui in release mode for ubuntu-24.04 x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu and macos-14 aarch64-apple-darwin, uploads tar.gz artifacts for both, and publishes a GitHub Release on tag pushes. Added companion workflow doc and README note.
close_reason: Added GitHub Actions workflow to build Linux x86_64 and macOS Apple Silicon binaries on every push and publish tagged releases, with companion docs and README notes. cargo test passes.

title: Fix WGSL volume shader validation panic
notes: Fixed WGSL validation failure by replacing swizzle assignments in front-to-back accumulation with whole-vector reconstruction. cargo test passes and cargo run -p viewer-egui now starts without shader parse panic.
close_reason: WGSL shader no longer uses invalid swizzle assignment syntax; viewer starts without runtime shader parse panic and workspace tests pass.

title: Add egui viewer for 3D Lenia backends
description: Create a runnable eframe/egui viewer crate for the 3D Lenia workspace with backend switching, simulation controls, and volume inspection via orthogonal slices and max-intensity projection.
acceptance_criteria: Workspace has a runnable viewer binary; controls support play/pause/step/randomize/clear; viewer can inspect XY/XZ/YZ and MIP modes; companion docs updated; build/test pass.
notes:
Starting viewer implementation: new eframe crate with controls, backend switching, and volume inspection modes.
Added viewer-egui crate with runnable eframe app, FFT/reference backend switching, play-pause-step controls, orthogonal slices, and MIP inspection. Verified with cargo fmt and cargo test.
Follow-up requested: convert viewer from image-only inspection to a real orbitable 3D viewport while preserving slice and MIP modes.
close_reason: Added runnable egui viewer with backend switching and 3D slice/MIP inspection.

title: Port key 2D viewer features into 3D app
notes: Ported key 2D viewer features into the 3D app: added KernelMode to lenia-core with centered-Gaussian and shell/ring families, exposed presets, added a kernel center-slice + radial-profile preview module in viewer-egui, made the controls pane scrollable, and raised the world-size cap from 96 to 160. cargo fmt and cargo test pass. Remaining 2D-era extras still not ported include direct painting tools, palette switching, and explorer search.

title: Add actual 3D viewport to egui Lenia viewer
description: Replace the current image-only inspection default with a true orbitable 3D viewport in the egui app while preserving orthogonal slice and MIP inspection modes.
acceptance_criteria: Viewer has a real 3D viewport mode with camera controls; slice/MIP modes still work; default view is 3D; docs updated; tests and formatting pass.
notes:
Implementing orbitable 3D volume viewport with thresholded point rendering, preserved slice/MIP modes, and defaulting the app to the true 3D view.
Added VolumeViewport module with orbit controls, thresholded point rendering, and cube frame. Viewer now defaults to true 3D mode, skips texture uploads in that mode, and keeps slice/MIP modes for inspection. Verified with cargo fmt and cargo test.
close_reason: Added a true 3D viewport to the egui viewer and preserved the slice/MIP inspection modes.

title: Add periodic 3D food seeding to viewer
description: Port the food-seeding idea from the 2D Lenia app into the 3D viewer with spherical Gaussian blob stamping, persistent or randomized food sources, and controls for periodic reseeding.
notes:
Adding a reusable 3D Gaussian seeding primitive in lenia-core plus viewer-side periodic food source controls and reseeding logic.
Implemented 3D Gaussian food seeding in lenia-core and periodic food controls in the egui viewer. Also corrected the voxel-cap artifact by replacing traversal-order downsampling with deterministic coordinate hashing.
close_reason: Added 3D Gaussian food seeding to the viewer and corrected the 3D voxel-cap artifact with deterministic hash-based selection.

title: Add backend abstraction and CPU FFT Lenia stepper
description: Introduce a backend interface for 3D Lenia, keep the direct reference path as the correctness oracle, and add a CPU FFT backend plus tests that compare its output to the reference implementation on small volumes.
acceptance_criteria: Simulation backend trait exists; reference backend caches kernel generation; CPU FFT backend passes equivalence tests against the direct stepper; companion docs updated.
notes:
This task continues the 3D-first bootstrap toward scalable GPU-oriented architecture.
Starting implementation: backend trait, cached reference backend, CPU FFT backend, and equivalence tests.
Implemented SimulationBackend plus ReferenceBackend and FftBackend. Added world-shape-aware FFT kernel-spectrum caching and tests proving FFT convolution and full-step equivalence against the direct reference backend on small volumes.
close_reason: Backend abstraction and CPU FFT path implemented with passing equivalence tests against the direct reference backend.
